title: Synthetic fixture: CE Gate orchestration crash after 2 of 4 surfaces (AC5, S2)
body:
## Summary

CE Gate orchestration crashed after completing CLI (passed) and browser (inconclusive/runtime).
Canvas and API surfaces were not evaluated before the crash.

Refs #501

<!-- pipeline-metrics
metrics_version: 4
credits:
  - port: ce-gate-cli
    status: passed
    evidence: "CE Gate CLI surface: all 2 scenarios passed."
  - port: ce-gate-browser
    status: inconclusive
    block_kind: runtime
    evidence: "CE Gate browser surface: browser automation failed to connect."
  - port: ce-gate-canvas
    status: inconclusive
    block_kind: orchestration
    evidence: "orchestration crashed before surface evaluated"
  - port: ce-gate-api
    status: inconclusive
    block_kind: orchestration
    evidence: "orchestration crashed before surface evaluated"
-->
